fitur_baru: Package Name: com.alquran.pro (SAME AS OLD - update seamless)
GPS Auto-Detect Lokasi via AndroidBridge + Nominatim Reverse Geocode
Fuzzy Match 518 kota API myquran (handle KAB./KOTA prefix)
Tombol 'Gunakan GPS Sekarang' di Sheet Pilih Lokasi
Notifikasi Update Native via WorkManager (background check tiap 6 jam)
Download Update di Background via WorkManager (progress real-time di status bar)
Auto-Reschedule Azan Alarm harian + Boot Receiver (persist lewat restart HP)
Azan Offline: MP3 dibundel di res/raw (bunyinya tanpa internet)
Color Accent Default #FF9F0A (Orange/Amber) + Color Picker Adjustable
Tasbih Color Sync Real-time via postMessage (hex format)
Service Worker Cache v31 (force refresh UI baru)
Immersive Edge-to-Edge + Safe Area Inset 5px (notch aman)
WebView Native Feel: no zoom, no scrollbar, no tap highlight, no context menu
Vibrasi Tasbih via tombol Volume fisik (native bridge)
Volume Azan Control: Minimal 10% - Maksimal 100%, Slider UI, Test Button, Native Sync
Smart Update: Deduplikasi download, auto-delete setelah install, cleanup state
petunjuk: Package Name SAMA dengan versi lama (com.alquran.pro) → update seamless tanpa uninstall.
Izin Notifikasi + Lokasi diminta SAAT PERTAMA BUKA APP (1 dialog). Klik 'Izinkan' keduanya.
GPS Auto-Detect jalan otomatis saat pertama buka. Kalau gagal → klik 'Gunakan GPS Sekarang' di Sheet Lokasi.
Azan Offline: file MP3 sudah di dalam APK (2.9MB + 1.8MB). Bunyi tetap nyala walau mode pesawat.
Update Otomatis: App cek update.json tiap 6 jam di background. Notif muncul di status bar tanpa buka app.
Warna Aksen: Default Orange (#FF9F0A). Bisa ganti di Pengaturan → seluruh halaman (Tasbih, Kalender, Jadwal) ikut berubah real-time.
Tasbih: Pakai tombol Volume Fisik (+/-) untuk increment/reset counter tanpa sentuh layar.
Volume Azan: Minimal 10% (tidak bisa mute), maksimal 100%. Default 10%. Bisa diatur di Pengaturan.
Jika download native stuck >5 detik → tombol 'Download via Browser (Fallback)' muncul otomatis.
bug: Fix: Permission dialog dobel (notif + lokasi) → sekarang 1 dialog gabungan.
Fix: GPS delay & stale location → pakai getLastKnownLocation + fallback navigator.geolocation.
Fix: Tasbih color async → sekarang sync instant pakai hex (bukan HSL).
Fix: Azan not repeat harian → auto-reschedule di onReceive + BootReceiver.
Fix: Update notif cuma di WebView → sekarang native WorkManager (bisa kill app).
Fix: Service worker cache stale → bump ke v31 force refresh.
Fix: Silent drop download Android 14 → pakai WorkManager + foreground notification.
Fix: Install APK intent → FileProvider + FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION.
Fix: Immersive mode crash → dipindah setelah setContentView().
Fix: Safe area notch → CSS env(safe-area-inset-top) + 5px native padding.
